message:
test(harness): time_ops harness-matrix + in-process oracle (bd-qhgx)

Adds two execution paths to time_ops_conformance_test (previously had
only schema/coverage validation):

  time_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case
    In-process oracle through `frankenlibc_fixture_exec`.
  time_ops_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix
    Isolated subprocess through `harness conformance-matrix-case`.

Fixtures use placeholder outputs (POSITIVE_INT / NON_NEGATIVE /
TM_STRUCT / "0" / "-1") to accommodate non-deterministic wall-clock
return values — the differential executor emits matching placeholders
when the underlying call succeeds.

Covers time / clock / clock_gettime (REALTIME, MONOTONIC, invalid) /
localtime_r across strict and hardened modes.

Verification (rch + isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_4):
  cargo test  -p frankenlibc-harness --test time_ops_conformance_test
                                                     13 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-harness          clean
  ubs <touched>                                       exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
